chunks.title: Ahaziah's Illness and Elijah's Message
chunks.reason: Establishes the context of Moab's revolt and Ahaziah's sickness, followed by Elijah's initial oracle.

chunks.title: The Messengers Return and the King Identifies Elijah
chunks.reason: Contains the dialogue between the king and his messengers regarding the man who intercepted them.

chunks.title: The First Two Commanders of Fifty
chunks.reason: Narrates the arrival and destruction of the first two groups sent by the king.

chunks.title: The Third Commander and Final Judgment
chunks.reason: Describes the third commander's plea, Elijah's acceptance of his message, and the fulfillment of the prophecy.

chunks.title: Epilogue on Ahaziah
chunks.reason: Provides a brief summary of Ahaziah's death and succession.
